steps: File tax reclaim with Danske Bank Custody for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on Novo Nordisk Class B dividends
Submit DK-NO tax treaty certificate showing 15% rate applies instead of 25% withheld
Reference ISIN DK0010244508 and 160,000 shares in reclaim documentation
Follow up within 30 days if Danske Bank doesn't acknowledge the treaty rate correction
